category_sources: source_facts.description says it converts between multiple disk image types; official SITS xmount page describes FUSE-based disk image conversion, write cache, and forensic-style formats.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is xmount; official SITS page title and repository use xmount/Xmount.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official SITS xmount page with supported formats and usage context; official repository README is available in the SITS GitLab project.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://code.sits.lu/foss/xmount, so per instruction repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official SITS page identify disk image conversion, FUSE, supported forensic/image formats, and command-line usage.
